full_text:
Wu Ju (Yuanda) 吳巨 (元大)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Ju (吳巨), styledYuanda (元大). Made Prefect of Cangwu through Liu Biao’s backing. Old friend of Liu Bei. Killed by Bu Zhi. Wu Ju was affiliated with Liu Biao. Wu Ju lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
